Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}What a coincidence, seeing you today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}It must be another one of God's whims...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Today is my son's... Akinari's birthday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}He'd be twenty if he was still alive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}He was almost an adult, but he never made it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Akinari had a genetic disease. I'm completely healthy, but him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}The doctors detected it when he was born... They knew he wouldn't live to see adulthood.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Every day, I worried whether he'd wake up the next morning... I blamed myself for what he inherited...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}He said something to me near the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}"I'm sorry to have brought so much pain into your life, Mother."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}"I'm glad that I was born into this world."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}"I'm glad to have been your son."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}"Thank you for the life you've given me."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}"I'm sorry to have brought so much pain into your life, Mother."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}"I'm glad that I was born into this world."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}"I'm glad to have been your son."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}"Thank you for the life you've given me."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}He suffered so much, and yet he still said that to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}But... Akinari brought me so much happiness too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Feeling his warmth as I carried him in my arms after he was born... Those tiny hands... That first smile...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Hearing his breathing as he slept at night...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Every day, I was so grateful he was alive... Every day, I found new joy in him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Now... I'm so alone, and there's nothing I can do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I have to keep going, looking straight ahead... That's how I want to live.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I'll eat the finest foods, visit the most exotic places...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I'll do everything, absolutely EVERYTHING, that Akinari couldn't...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I'll have so many stories to tell him about the things I've done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}On that day... when we meet again, on the other side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}If I didn't have that to look forward to... I don't know how I could go on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}That reminds me... When my son's condition worsened, he started writing a children's story.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}But when I was cleaning out his room, I never found his notebook...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}He said he wanted you to be the first one to see it, when he was done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Then he laughed and said I would be second...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I suppose... he wasn't able to finish the story...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}What...? So, did you get to read the story...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I explained how I received the notebook from[n]Kamiki, and that I heard the entire story...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I'm so glad... That was my only regret...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}It was awful to think that he wasn't able to finish his project...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}...Oh, you should hold onto his notebook. I'm sure that's what he would want, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I'll hear the story from him directly, when I see him on the other side...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}...Now I have one more thing to look forward to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I'm glad I could finally meet you. Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}...Before I go, let this old woman give you one piece of advice...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Take good care of the ones you hold dear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}If you wait until their day comes... it's too late. Clinging to their cold bodies won't bring them back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}...Everyone who's born will die someday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Not just Akinari, or me, or even you. It's all the same...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}It doesn't take a grand gesture. You don't have to make a big production of it, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}If you love someone, let them know it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}We all go through life with the same struggles, the same heartbreak...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}We should all lift each other up with the same love and kindness as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I'm sure you have something precious you can share with people, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kamiki's mother left without looking back...[n]{f 1 1}
